attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	 BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM    
	,BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT     
	,BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT
	,BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM
	,BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID   
	,BK_INVOICE_SEGMENT_SEQ_NUM_INT
	,BK_CLASS_OF_SERVICE_TYPE_CD   
	,SEGMENT_ARRIVAL_DTM           
	,SEGMENT_DEPARTURE_DTM         
	,SEGMENT_CONNECTION_FLG        
	,REPORTED_CURRENCY_EXCHANGE_RT 
	,SEGMENT_DOMESTIC_INTRNTNL_CD  
	,SEGMENT_MILES_CNT             
	,SEGMENT_FARE_REPORTING_AMT    
	,SEGMENT_TYPE                  
	,SEGMENT_ORIGIN_ISO_COUNTRY_CD 
	,SEGMENT_DEST_ISO_COUNTRY_CD   
	,FARE_TYPE_CD                  
	,FLIGHT_FARE_BASIS_CD          
	,RU_FLIGHT_ORGN_IATA_AIRPORT_CD
	,RU_PASSAGE_DSTN_RAIL_STN_CD   
	,RU_PASSAGE_ORGN_RAIL_STN_CD   
	,RU_FLIGHT_DSTN_IATA_AIRPORT_CD
	,RU_TRIP_ORIGIN_RAIL_STN_CD    
	,RU_TRIP_ORGN_IATA_AIRPORT_CD  
	,RU_FLIGHT_NUM                 
	,RU_FLIGHT_SERVICE_CLASS_CD    
	,RU_IATA_AIRLINE_CD            
	,RU_TRAIN_NUM                  
	,RU_RAIL_SERVICE_CLASS_CD      
	,RU_AMEX_RAIL_CARRIER_CD       
        ,FLIGHT_DEPARTURE_DT           
	,FLIGHT_ARRIVAL_DT             
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_AMEX_TRVL_INVCE_SGMNT_DETAIL WTSD
WHERE NOT EXISTS(
	   SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AMEX_TRVL_INVCE_SGMNT_DETAIL NTSD
	  			 WHERE 
				   	 WTSD.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM    =  NTSD.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_NUM
				   AND   WTSD.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT     =  NTSD.BK_AMEX_TRAVEL_INVOICE_DT
				   AND   WTSD.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT=  NTSD.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_PSNGR_NUM_INT
				   AND   WTSD.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM=  NTSD.BK_AMX_TRVL_INV_ACTG_BRNCH_NUM
				   AND   WTSD.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID   =  NTSD.BK_AMEX_TRVL_INV_MACHINE_ID
				   AND   WTSD.BK_INVOICE_SEGMENT_SEQ_NUM_INT=  NTSD.BK_INVOICE_SEGMENT_SEQ_NUM_INT
       )
